Interface IClanRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
ClanRepository
public interface IClanRepository
Async persistence contract for clans, members, and member permissions.

All methods return CompletableFuture and execute on the shared database executor. Callers must never block the main thread on these futures.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    deleteClan(UUID clanId)
    Deletes a clan and all its member rows (via cascade).
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    deleteMember(UUID playerUuid)
    Deletes a member row by player UUID.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    deletePermission(UUID playerUuid, ClanPermission permission)
    Revokes a specific permission from a member.

    findAllClans()

    findClanById(UUID clanId)

    findMembersByClan(UUID clanId)

    findPermissionsByClan(UUID clanId)
    Loads every member's permissions for a clan in a single query.

    findPermissionsForPlayer(UUID playerUuid)
     
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    insertClan(ClanModel model)
    Persists a new clan.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    insertMember(ClanMemberModel model)
    Inserts a member row.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    insertPermission(UUID playerUuid, ClanPermission permission)
    Grants a permission to a member.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    setLeader(UUID playerUuid, boolean isLeader)
    Sets the leader flag for a member.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    transferLeader(UUID oldLeaderUuid, UUID newLeaderUuid)
    Atomically transfers leadership from one member to another in a single transaction.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    updateMotd(UUID clanId, String motd)
    Sets or clears the clan's message of the day.

  • Method Details

    • insertClan

      CompletableFuture<Void> insertClan(ClanModel model)
      Persists a new clan.
      Parameters:
      model - the clan to insert
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is written

    • deleteClan

      CompletableFuture<Void> deleteClan(UUID clanId)
      Deletes a clan and all its member rows (via cascade).
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan to delete
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is deleted

    • findClanById

      CompletableFuture<Optional<ClanModel>> findClanById(UUID clanId)
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of the clan row, or empty if not found

    • findClanByName

      CompletableFuture<Optional<ClanModel>> findClanByName(String name)
      Parameters:
      name - the clan's display name (case-sensitive)
      Returns:
      a future of the clan row, or empty if not found

    • findAllClans

      CompletableFuture<List<ClanModel>> findAllClans()
      Returns:
      a future of all clans ordered by name

    • updateMotd

      CompletableFuture<Void> updateMotd(UUID clanId, String motd)
      Sets or clears the clan's message of the day.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan's UUID
      motd - the new MOTD, or null to clear
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is updated

    • insertMember

      CompletableFuture<Void> insertMember(ClanMemberModel model)
      Inserts a member row.
      Parameters:
      model - the member to insert
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is written

    • deleteMember

      CompletableFuture<Void> deleteMember(UUID playerUuid)
      Deletes a member row by player UUID.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player to remove
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is deleted

    • findMemberByPlayer

      CompletableFuture<Optional<ClanMemberModel>> findMemberByPlayer(UUID playerUuid)
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of the member row, or empty if the player is not in any clan

    • findMembersByClan

      CompletableFuture<List<ClanMemberModel>> findMembersByClan(UUID clanId)
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of all member rows for this clan

    • setLeader

      CompletableFuture<Void> setLeader(UUID playerUuid, boolean isLeader)
      Sets the leader flag for a member.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the member's UUID
      isLeader - the new leader flag value
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is updated

    • transferLeader

      CompletableFuture<Void> transferLeader(UUID oldLeaderUuid, UUID newLeaderUuid)
      Atomically transfers leadership from one member to another in a single transaction.
      Parameters:
      oldLeaderUuid - the current leader's UUID
      newLeaderUuid - the incoming leader's UUID
      Returns:
      a future that completes when both rows are updated

    • insertPermission

      CompletableFuture<Void> insertPermission(UUID playerUuid, ClanPermission permission)
      Grants a permission to a member. Silently ignored if already present.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the member's UUID
      permission - the permission to grant
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is written

    • deletePermission

      CompletableFuture<Void> deletePermission(UUID playerUuid, ClanPermission permission)
      Revokes a specific permission from a member.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the member's UUID
      permission - the permission to revoke
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is deleted

    • findPermissionsForPlayer

      CompletableFuture<List<ClanPermission>> findPermissionsForPlayer(UUID playerUuid)
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of all permissions currently held by the player

    • findPermissionsByClan

      CompletableFuture<Map<UUID, Set<ClanPermission>>> findPermissionsByClan(UUID clanId)
      Loads every member's permissions for a clan in a single query.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan's UUID
      Returns:
      a future mapping each member UUID to their permission set
